Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Witnesses (The Elder Empire: Shadow)]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — The Witnesses is a group that Naberius Clayborn works for.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 5''' — Zhen told the prisoner to save his biography for the Witnesses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Shera has killed Witnesses before.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — The Guild discourages relationships between Witnesses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — There were two Witnesses present.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — The Witnesses investigate claims of wrongdoing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 10''' — Witnesses can Read clothing and weaponry to provide notarized testimony.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 11''' — Witnesses can verify testimony and support alliances.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — The Witnesses act as neutral arbitrators.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Witnesses can collaborate on creating boxes to seal Vessels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Witnesses work in pairs consisting of a Chronicler and a Silent One.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Both sets of Witnesses were still alive in the tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — The Witnesses report on the deaths of Guild Heads.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — The Witnesses are the hope from the events of today.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — The Witnesses are a guild that speaks the unvarnished truth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — The twin Witnesses are one of the Guild Heads Bareius suggests should not be assassinated.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
